plan_kts:
fun plan(docsReportPath: String, testsReportPath: String, reviewContextPath: String): Result {
    val docsReport = readFile(docsReportPath)
    val testsReport = readFile(testsReportPath)
    val reviewContext = readFile(reviewContextPath)
    val docsFindings = parseDocsLeg(docsReport)
    val testFindings = parseTestsLeg(testsReport)
    val changedAreas = extractChangedAreas(reviewContext)
    val consistencySignals = compareDocsAndTests(docsFindings, testFindings, changedAreas)
    val clusterVerdict = buildConsistencyRollupVerdict(consistencySignals)
    val evidenceSummary = summarizeVerdictForEvidence(clusterVerdict)
    val persisted = writeFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/consistency-rollup-verdict.json", content = evidenceSummary)
    return makeResult(clusterVerdict, persisted)
}
